positive: A majestic and intricate mystical forest scene merging with cosmic elements. Show bioluminescent flora, geometric crystalline structures growing from mossy ground, and a central, stylized silhouette of an ancient celestial deer (stag) standing amidst glowing vines. The color palette should utilize deep indigo, sapphire blue, emerald green, and vibrant accents of glowing gold. The style should be a blend of Art Nouveau and ethereal vaporwave, emphasizing strong outlines, high contrast, and clean symmetry. The composition must be centered, optimized for seamless repeating apparel print, with a focus on clean, non-photorealistic linework and solid color blocks. Cinematic volumetric lighting from unseen cosmic sources, hyper-detailed, perfect symmetry, print quality artwork.
